name: Spicy Black Eyed Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
Use 15.8 ounce cans of black-eyed peas.
1. Cook the bacon in a large saucepan until it is lightly browned.
2. Add onion, jalapenos, tomatoes, garlic, salt and pepper to the bacon drippings.
3. Saute for 5 minutes.
4. Add water and bouillon, dissolving the cubes in the mixture.
5. Stir in the peas.
6. Add cheese and simmer gently until the cheese is melted.
